description:
This quiz assesses practical knowledge of JavaScript Promises, testing the ability to read, write, and debug asynchronous code. It is moderately challenging, with a supportive, hands‑on teaching tone that encourages experimentation in the browser console. The format includes hints, interactive code challenges, and community engagement via social media.
Topics: JavaScript Promises, asynchronous programming, promise chaining, error handling with .catch, async/await basics
Audience: Front‑end developers and JavaScript learners who have basic scripting experience and want to deepen their understanding of async patterns.
